body: Pi's REPL (driven via tmux) is a persistent process; the daemon's PID-liveness check holds the UUID-keyed session across the 20s idle window. Recording shows readyâ†’workingâ†’ready before idle and readyâ†’workingâ†’ready after the second send.
caveats: Production daemon readyTTL is 30 min; this recording proves session continuity over 20s but does not exercise the TTL itself.
